name: barzakh_adversary_generate
description: Generate a UEFI bootkit payload for red-team testing. Supports 33 payload types including trampoline, boot_services_hook, pe_inject, secureboot_bypass, blacklotus_mok, acpi_backdoor, logofail_image, pixiefail_dhcp, arm_trustzone, riscv_opensbi and more. Use 'barzakh_adversary_list' to see all available payloads.

payload.description: Payload name (e.g. trampoline, boot_services_hook, pe_inject, secureboot_bypass, blacklotus_mok, acpi_backdoor, arm_trustzone, riscv_opensbi)

output.description: Output file path for the generated bootkit binary
